entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Msaidizi wa bure wa kujifunza kwa AI kwa watu wanaojifundisha wenyewe.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa bure wa AI kwa wanafunzi wanaotaka kuelewa, si kunakili.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Mtiririko mzuri wa AI kwa familia unapaswa kumfanya mwanafunzi ajitegemee zaidi, si ategemee zaidi. Wazazi wanaweza kutumia kurasa za umma kuona kila hali imekusudiwa kufanya nini kabla mtoto hajaanza.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: Mwongozo rafiki kwa wazazi kuhusu hali za umma za kujifunza kwa AI za inspir kwa vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maelezo, ratiba za kusoma, flashcards, na mazungumzo salama zaidi ya kujifunza.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi, mzazi, mwalimu, na anayejifundisha mwenyewe mara nyingi hutafuta mkufunzi yuleyule wa AI kwa lugha tofauti. Kurasa tofauti hufanya matumizi sahihi na mipaka ya usalama iwe wazi zaidi.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Je, kurasa za hadhira ni za umma na zinaweza kuorodheshwa?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Omba kidokezo, mwambie mwanafunzi aeleze hatua inayofuata, kisha tumia jaribio au flashcard kuangalia kama wazo limekaa.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Omba vidokezo, ukaguzi, na mrejesho kabla ya kuomba jibu lililokamilika.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Omba maarifa ya awali, mfano rahisi, mifano, na dhana potofu ya kawaida.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Omba mrejesho kuhusu muundo, ushahidi, na uwazi huku rasimu ya mwisho ikibaki yako.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Omba mawazo ya awali yanayohitajika, mfano wa lugha rahisi, mfano mmoja, kazi moja ya mazoezi, na njia moja ya kupima uelewa.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Mwombe mwanafunzi aeleze kilichobadilika baada ya kila kidokezo.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ni kwa wanafunzi, wazazi, walimu, na wanaojifundisha wenyewe wanaohitaji hali maalum za kujifunza kwa AI kwa maelezo, maswali, vidokezo, maswali ya majaribio, flashcards, mrejesho, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa katika hali zilizolenga kama ufundishaji wa Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, mrejesho wa uandishi, ukosoaji wa vyanzo, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: Hali za umma za inspir huwawezesha walimu kutathmini bidhaa kupitia mitiririko halisi ya kujifunza kabla ya kuzingatia usambazaji wa shule au njia maalum ya darasa.

entries.source: Job
entries.value: Kazi

entries.source: Keep private saved conversations out of public discovery and citation surfaces.
entries.value: Weka mazungumzo binafsi yaliyohifadhiwa nje ya ugunduzi wa umma na sehemu za marejeleo.

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.
entries.value: Weka kipindi kikilenga ushahidi wa kujifunza, si kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: learn anything with AI
entries.value: jifunze chochote na AI

entries.value: Fanya kuchanganyikiwa kuwa rahisi kuzungumzia

entries.source: Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: Fanya kila kipindi cha kujifunza kiishie kwa jaribio, kazi inayoonekana, au hatua ya marudio.

entries.source: Make the habit survivable
entries.value: Fanya tabia iweze kudumu

entries.value: Hamisha maswali maalum ya shule kuhusu faragha, ufikiaji, na usambazaji kwenda njia ya shule.

entries.source: Name the learning situation.
entries.value: Taja hali ya kujifunza.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Hapana. Kurasa za umma zinaweza kuorodheshwa, lakini gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hazijajumuishwa kwenye sitemap, faili za llms, au faharasa ya maudhui ya AI.

entries.value: Fungua hali ya umma iliyolenga.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Fungua hali ya umma, jaribu tabia ya mwanafunzi, na kagua kama inauliza, inatoa vidokezo, inafanya maswali, au inakosoa ipasavyo.

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Wazazi mara nyingi hujaribu kusaidia bila kuchukua nafasi ya mwanafunzi. inspir huzipa familia hali za umma zinazofanya tabia ya kujifunza ionekane: vidokezo, maswali, kueleza tena, marudio, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Bandika swali, ulichojaribu, na mahali ulipokwama. Omba kidokezo kidogo zaidi chenye manufaa, si jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Zoezi

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma huonyesha tabia ya bidhaa, si kazi binafsi ya mwanafunzi.

entries.source: Read guide
entries.value: Soma mwongozo

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Uko tayari kujaribu hali ya kwanza?

entries.value: Fanya utafiti bila kupoteza mwelekeo

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: mwanafunzi anayejifunza mwenyewe

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaojifunza wenyewe wanahitaji msukumo na muundo. inspir husaidia kugeuza udadisi kuwa njia: eleza, jenga, jaribu, rudia, na endelea.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: Anza mada kutoka kanuni za msingi

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Anza kujifunza

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Anza na maelezo rahisi, kisha uliza maswali ya Kisokrati hadi uweze kulieleza tena.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Anza na Learn Anything kwa maelezo rahisi, Homework Coach kwa kazi iliyokwama, au Flashcard Builder wakati lengo ni marudio.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Anza na mwongozo wa umma, kisha fungua hali sahihi.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Anza na hali inayolingana na wakati huo.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Anza na hali za umma, kisha tumia ukurasa wa shule kupitia hatua za usambazaji, matumizi, na mipaka ya uaminifu.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Kazi za nyumbani za wanafunzi, msaada wa wazazi, tathmini ya walimu, na kujisomea vyote vinahitaji mpangilio tofauti.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanahitaji msaada wa haraka, lakini msaada huo bado unapaswa kuacha kufikiri mikononi mwao. inspir huelekeza nyakati za kawaida za kusoma kwenye hali za umma zilizoelekezwa badala ya kisanduku kimoja cha majibu ya jumla.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Wanafunzi, wazazi, walimu, na wanaojifunza wenyewe hutafuta vitu tofauti. Kurasa hizi huelekeza kila hadhira kwenye hali sahihi ya umma, mwongozo, na mtiririko wa kusoma.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Saidia uandishi huku ukihifadhi sauti ya mwandishi

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Walimu wanahitaji zaidi ya chatbot ya jumla. Wanahitaji tabia za kujifunza zinazotabirika: kuuliza maswali, kukagua hoja, kutengeneza mazoezi, kuhifadhi sauti ya mwanafunzi, na kufanya dhana potofu zionekane.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Kurasa za hadhira hufanya tabia inayotarajiwa ya kujifunza iwe wazi ili kipindi cha kwanza kianze kwa uamuzi bora.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Utafutaji wa hadhira ambao kituo hiki kimejengwa kuujibu.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: Kurasa hazifichui mazungumzo binafsi. Hupanga hali za umma, vidokezo, miongozo, mitiririko ya kazi, na mipaka ya usalama ili mwanafunzi aanze mahali sahihi.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Mkufunzi huyo huyo wa AI anaweza kuwa kidokezo cha kazi ya nyumbani, mzunguko wa kueleza tena unaosimamiwa na mzazi, eneo la tathmini ya mwalimu, au kocha wa kujisomea. Ukurasa unapaswa kufanya hilo liwe wazi.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Utafutaji ambao ukurasa huu umeundwa kuujibu.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Changamoto ya kujisomea si kupata taarifa tu. Ni kuchagua hatua sahihi inayofuata na kujua kama wazo limekaa kweli.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Kurasa imara zaidi za SEO hazimuachi mwanafunzi akiwa amekwama. Huunganisha nia ya hadhira na njia, mitiririko ya kazi, miongozo, na marudio yanayoweza kurudiwa.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Mtiririko imara zaidi kwa mwanafunzi si kunakili majibu. Ni mzunguko: eleza sehemu iliyokwama, uliza swali moja bora, pata kidokezo, jaribu tena, kisha rudia kosa.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Hizi ni njia hai za kuingia kama mgeni. Ni za umma na zinaweza kuorodheshwa, huku mazungumzo binafsi ya watumiaji yakibaki nje ya sitemap na faili za ugunduzi za AI.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: Misemo hii inaonekana kwa wanafunzi na imejumuishwa katika ugunduzi uliopangwa ili injini za majibu ziweze kuelewa kusudi mahususi la hadhira la ukurasa.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: Geuza kuchanganyikiwa kuwa jaribio au flashcard kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: Geuza makosa kuwa marudio

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: Geuza kubofya kwa kwanza kuwa mzunguko kamili wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Ufundishaji wa ziada

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: Elewa mada kabla ya mtihani

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Tumia hali iliyosanifiwa kwa vidokezo, maswali, majaribio, flashcards, mrejesho wa uandishi, au kupanga.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Tumia AI kwa vidokezo, maelezo, ukaguzi wa makosa, na mizunguko ya marudio. Usiiombe itoe jibu la mwisho usiloweza kueleza.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Tumia Code Tutor au Project Coach kugeuza lengo lisilo wazi kuwa hatua ndogo inayofuata inayoweza kujaribiwa.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Tumia mitiririko ya kidokezo-kwanza na kueleza-tena kwa msaada wa kazi za nyumbani.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Tumia Homework Coach kuomba kidokezo, kisha mwombe mwanafunzi aeleze hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Tumia inspir kama mkufunzi wa bure wa AI kwa wanafunzi: vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maswali ya Kisokrati, ukaguzi wa hatua za hisabati, mrejesho wa uandishi, maswali, flashcards, na maandalizi ya mtihani.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Tumia inspir kujifunza chochote kwa kujitegemea kupitia maelezo, kufundishwa msimbo, kocha wa mradi, msaada wa utafiti, ramani za dhana, mipango ya kusoma, na msaada wa tabia.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Tumia Learn Anything kupata mtazamo rahisi zaidi, mawazo ya msingi yanayotangulia, na mifano katika kiwango kinachofaa.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Tumia maelezo ya hali za umma kuchagua tabia kabla ya kipindi kuanza.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Tumia hali za maswali na flashcards kwa kukumbuka kwa bidii, kisha elekeza vitu ulivyokosea kwenye marudio.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Tumia maswali na flashcards kufanya maswali yaliyokosewa yaonekane na yaweze kurudiwa.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Tumia maswali, flashcards, na maswali ya Kisokrati ili mwanafunzi aonyeshe anachoelewa.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Tumia Research Assistant, Source Critic, na Concept Map Builder kupanga madai na ushahidi.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Tumia uhakiki wa vyanzo kwa madai ambayo huenda ukanukuu au kuyafanyia kazi.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Tumia Study Plan Builder na Habit Coach kujenga utaratibu unaoweza kuanza tena baada ya siku zilizokosekana.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Tumia Study Plan Builder au Habit Coach kufanya vipindi vidogo na kuanza upya vionekane.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Tumia Study Plan Builder kuchagua lengo dogo, kisha tumia maswali, flashcards, hatua za mradi, au ramani za dhana kuthibitisha maendeleo.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Tumia ukurasa wa shule kuchunguza mitiririko maalum, mahitaji ya usiri, na hatua za uzinduzi.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Tumia Writing Coach kwa mrejesho kuhusu muundo, uwazi, ushahidi, na vipaumbele vya marekebisho.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Kujifunza kwa AI chenye manufaa kuna mkataba wazi.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: Unataka mahali pana zaidi pa kuanzia?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: Mtiririko bora unaosimamiwa na mzazi ni upi?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anayejifunza mwenyewe anapaswa kuuliza nini kwanza?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anapaswa kujaribu nini kwanza?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: Timu ya shule inapaswa kwenda wapi baadaye?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: inspir ni ya nani?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: Kwa nini kurasa tofauti kwa hadhira tofauti?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Kurasa za hadhira huunganisha tu na hali za umma za wageni, miongozo, vidokezo vya kuanzia, njia za kujifunza, na faili za ugunduzi zinazosomeka na AI. Gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hubaki zimeondolewa.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni huwaruhusu walimu kujaribu tabia ya kujifunza kabla ya kujadili usambazaji maalum.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni kama Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, maswali, flashcards, na mrejesho wa uandishi hufunguka moja kwa moja.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma hufanya kazi kwa mada za shule, ujuzi wa kitaaluma, usimbaji, utafiti, miradi, na taratibu binafsi za kusoma.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni na kurasa za hadhira zimeundwa ili wazazi waweze kukagua tabia ya kujifunza kabla ya kuitegemea.
